title: Cute Police Box Addon
description: The super duper adorably awesome silly ridiculously pink police box that does not resemble an actual police box. Inexplicably smells like waffles.
body:
# Cute Police Box Addon
A [Dalek Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dalek-mod) addon that re-adds the Cute Police Box from 1.12! The Super duper adorably awesome silly ridiculously pink police box that does not resemble an actual police box. Inexplicably smells like waffles.
